radar_config.name: Trending Radar
radar_config.description: Catch viral repos before they go mainstream

github_search_queries.name: New AI Agents
github_search_queries.query: created:>%s agent ai assistant llm stars:>100

github_search_queries.name: Hot Coding Tools
github_search_queries.query: pushed:>%s code editor ide cursor claude stars:>200

github_search_queries.name: Local AI / Self-Hosted
github_search_queries.query: pushed:>%s local llm ollama self-hosted privacy stars:>100

github_search_queries.name: Terminal / CLI AI
github_search_queries.query: pushed:>%s terminal cli tui ai assistant stars:>50

github_search_queries.name: Reverse Engineering / Security
github_search_queries.query: pushed:>%s reverse engineering decompile security audit stars:>50
